item.title: Preference learning from corrections
steps: Define PreferenceSignal struct: timestamp, action_type, original_decision, correction, signal_type (preference/boundary/one-time), applied_to_identity
Implement correction classifier: determine if correction is preference, boundary, or one-time override
Implement signal accumulator: track signals per category
Implement threshold proposer: when 5+ signals in same category, propose preference update
Implement identity file updater: apply approved preference updates with rollback capability
Log all preference changes for audit trail
acceptanceCriteria: Corrections are classified into preference, boundary, or one-time override
After 5 signals in the same category, a preference update is proposed
User approves preference updates before they're applied
Applied preferences are logged with rollback capability
Boundary signals are never overridden by preference signals
